title: Deal Highlights · Bookmaker INPUT
description: The structured deal data the Hack hands to the Bookmaker. Every number here is locked by the Hack at underwrite time. The Bookmaker references these values but NEVER computes new ones. If a field is missing, the Bookmaker writes [TBD: <field>] in the output.

deal_id.description: Firm-internal deal ID (sha256 fingerprint or atlas-cookbook ID)

asset_class.description: STNL category — Dollar General STNL · Walgreens corner · CVS pharmacy · QSR ground lease · auto retail · industrial cold storage · multifamily Sun Belt · MOB · etc.

market.description: MSA or city/state · Tampa FL · Dallas TX · Memphis TN · Phoenix AZ · etc.

submarket.description: Optional finer-grained location · I-4 Corridor · NE Tampa · Buckhead · etc.

cap_rate.description: Asking cap rate · pre-formatted as percentage or band

noi.description: Net operating income · annual · optional but improves output quality

tenant_credit.description: Credit tier and rating — BBB / IG · BBB+ / IG · BB / sub-IG · A- / IG · Moody's Baa2 · non-rated franchisee · etc.

tenant_brand.description: Specific tenant brand name · Dollar General · Walgreens · 7-Eleven · McDonald's · Tractor Supply · etc.

rent_escalations.description: Bump pattern · 10% every 5 · CPI-linked · flat · etc.

size_sf.description: Building square footage · ONLY include if from rent roll or lease · do not estimate

lot_size_acres.description: Land size · ONLY include if from survey

year_built.description: ONLY include if confirmed from public records

buyer_segment.description: Target buyer segment for this deliverable (informs voice/angle)

deliverable_type.description: Which of the 10 Bookmaker deliverable types is requested

brand_pack_id.description: Firm brand pack to apply · default 'swarm_and_bee' · could be 'atlas_as_a_closer' or a vendor REIT brand

template_id.description: Specific template within the deliverable type · stnl-default · institutional-pitch · 1031-clock · etc.

hedera_anchor_topic.description: HCS topic for receipt · default 0.0.10291838 (firm deed anchor topic)

extras.description: Open-ended Hack notes for the Bookmaker · drone shots requested · seller wants quick close · tax-deferred angle · etc.
